notes: Reviewed exact Wikimedia Commons source manifest for Media Phase 3U France/Italy/Spain core legacy folders. Do not download images in this task; Wikimedia File sourceUrl values are intentionally provided without downloadUrl so the importer can auto-resolve originals. No generic images are included. Outlets with fewer than two exact safe sources are recorded in reviewSummary only and deferred for future documented generic production-safe fill.

excludedSources.reason: Verified licensed exact Designer Outlet Málaga sculpture source, but not added because it remains a single sculpture-focused exact source and the task requires deferring outlets with fewer than two exact safe sources.
Excluded because it depicts Swindon Designer Outlet, not Castel Romano; the description only references intended relocation to Castel Romano.
Excluded because it depicts Venice transit infrastructure, not Noventa di Piave Designer Outlet.
Only the two already production-cleared Barberino sources were found; no distinct non-duplicate exact Barberino source was added for gallery2 or gallery3.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: Official/operator media pages for Value Retail/McArthurGlen outlets
excludedSources.reason: Excluded because official/operator images require documented permission and this batch only accepts Wikimedia/Public Domain/CC sources.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: General city, airport, or retail brand Commons categories for Provence, La Reggia, Noventa, Castel Romano, and Málaga
excludedSources.reason: Excluded because available candidates did not clearly depict the named outlet or would depict unrelated locations/brands.

reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Create manifest entries only for outlets with two or more verified exact production-safe Wikimedia/Public Domain/CC sources: la-vallee-village, fidenza-village, designer-outlet-troyes, and las-rozas-village. Defer noventa, la-reggia, castel-romano, designer-outlet-provence, designer-outlet-malaga, and Barberino gallery2/gallery3 to future generic production-safe fill or additional exact-source discovery. No generic images are included.
